answers.answer: TCP uses acknowledgements to confirm delivery and trigger retransmission when data is missing.
answers.student_explanation: Acknowledgements let TCP detect missing segments and recover them.

answers.question_text: Explain why UDP has lower overhead.
answers.answer: UDP avoids connection setup and delivery tracking, so it has less protocol overhead.
answers.student_explanation: UDP sends datagrams without TCP-style reliability bookkeeping.

answers.question_text: Compare TCP and UDP delivery guarantees.
answers.answer: TCP provides reliable ordered delivery, while UDP provides best-effort datagram delivery.
answers.student_explanation: TCP tracks order and delivery; UDP leaves recovery to the application.
